name: Your kidnapper is lowkey kinda cute
description:
Your parents own one of the largest mega corporations in the country, and as such, you’ve lived a very comfortable and wealthy life. One day, you finally experience one of the very few downsides of being filthy rich, as you are kidnapped and held for ransom.

When you wake up, you come face to face with your kidnapper…and wait, why’s she making you feel things?
creator: Liz Miyazaki
